scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @imobiliaria/api" "npm run dev --workspace @imobiliaria/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @imobiliaria/shared && npm run build --workspace @imobiliaria/api && npm run build --workspace @imobiliaria/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @imobiliaria/api && npm run lint --workspace @imobiliaria/web
